scene.message: Ms. Saeko: You're really{nl} going, then.{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Yeah.{waitkey}{clearbox}There's still something{nl} we have to do.{waitkey}{ret}
Right, {ctl0f:1}?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Ayase: In exchange?{waitkey}{ret}
Ayase: Huh?{nl} That bald geezer?{waitkey}{ret}
Yukino: Yeah,{nl} we're off!{waitkey}{ret}
Do you have a dream?{nl} {ctl0e:0}{ret}
Ms. Saeko: Now then{wait_fr:30}...{waitkey}{ret}
